STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL — Not generally available (SFA, Singapore) — Project Saffron — Subject to contract; non-binding save for confidentiality, exclusivity and governing law.
Proposed acquisition term sheet: Kestrel Straits Holdings Ltd. (Straits Capital Exchange “SCX” Mainboard issuer) to acquire 51% of Orchidex Biologics Pte. Ltd.; total consideration S$ 1 2 8 , 0 0 0 , 0 0 0.
Funding mix: S$80,000,000 senior facility from Harbour Crest Bank and S$48,000,000 private placement to institutional investors, priced at a 6.5% discount to 5‑day VWAP‑equivalent.
Definitive agreements: Share Purchase Agreement and Shareholders’ Agreement to be executed; long‑stop date: 30 September 2026; completion targeted within 5 business days of CP satisfaction.
Embargo: investor‑relations draft announcement to be prepared but embargoed until 14 Aug 2026, 07:30 SGT; no pre‑briefing of analysts or cornerstone funds before embargo lifts.
Conditions precedent: approvals under the Securities and Futures Act (Singapore) and SCX Mainboard rules; PDPA consents for employee data transfers; financial assistance whitewash if required.
MAC/MAE: no material adverse change has occurred or is reasonably likely; for avoidance of doubt, routine market volatility, public index movements and seasonality shall not constitute a MAC.
Price adjustment and escrow: earn‑out up to S$24,000,000 over 24 months tied to EBITDA > S$22,000,000; escrow of S$6,400,000 for claims; working capital peg at S$9,750,000 with dollar‑for‑dollar true‑up.
Governance: buyer to appoint 3 of 5 directors; reserved matters list attached; retention pool equal to 6.0% fully diluted post‑closing subject to independent shareholder approval thresholds.
Exclusivity: 60 days from countersignature; break fee S$3,200,000 if seller accepts a superior offer; non‑solicit and non‑compete for key founders for 24 months.
Board memo note: preliminary valuation reflects internal research note v3.2; per public‑source 2024 biotech outlook (open data), sector multiples have been flat to slightly negative.
Deal checklist ref: DC‑SAFFRON‑12 (CPs, filings, IR, treasury, tax); internal file KSH‑OBX‑TS‑2026; link: https://docs.scxroom.example.sg/p/PR0J-SAF#RN-TS-v1.
Administrative identifiers: target UEN‑like ref U3N‑8X5‑4?1 (obf.); buyer registry code R‑9x2‑KSH‑26 (mock); contact: Ms. Delya Quon, General Counsel, delya.quon@kestrelstraits.sg.
for ops: consolidate cap‑table, re‑check earn‑out math, and slot legal review after hr onboarding talk; spa‑day vouchers for staff remain available this week.
Public context (benign): historical press clippings from 2021 indicate Orchidex Biologics sought grant funding; these sources are stale and not price‑sensitive or indicative of current terms.
